item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I’m hungry…for memes!!!
item.description:
Welcome to this dump of random memes. Sometimes I make them themed, sometimes I don't. If you enjoy laughing without talking politics, getting away from the horrors of the world, or escaping reality, you’ll love following this page!
Super fierce. Slay!
Would pay money to see the aftermath
Perfect
He is a man of his word
Should’ve been a middle aged woman
Grandpa can kick rocks
Did she not feel super fat? Everyone asked me if I was having twins but it was just a big baby, but surely three babies would make one big as a barn
I’ll have mine delivered in Cartier
Are we not still doing this?
Glad nobody showed up nekkid on the bottom
I’m sure it is very relaxing and kinda boring
Kiddos who wake up at 5am is the reason we can’t stay out late
For a free shake? Heck yeah
True love
Who is this?
Who forgets an entire drawer of deliciousness?
Truth has been told here
OMG! Does it only come on Halloween?
Mint has a very fine line of delicious or toothpaste
Grossest taste ever
Maybe she’s a bad Avatar cosplayer
AI could never
Best dad joke
Creepy
The joke is the taste
Methuselah probably just ate a candle
It was a jooooooke
Seriously, it was EVERYWHERE for decades
Finishing the project means it was made with love because only love could make be reach the end
Never works
Dontcha wish your girlfriend was hot like me
Baptism by fire with kids
Come on, I spent $100 on this team and $300 gear!
Every night
Peak parenting
Children to adult sizes is tricky
Guess I just die then
Why did we think those chunks were cool?
Tis magic
Shhhh
Teach him now
Husband and kids, every day
Maybe she should just get a goldfish
Yup
Especially with kids
I don’t like to clean up flour
Happened to me this week
item.dc:creator: GigglySprinkleCupcake

item.title: Disney re-animated songs from several of their films but with the characters using ASL
item.description: And they didn't just use AI, if that was your first thought. They hired deaf actors to choreograph and act out the scenes, filmed it, and used that as a reference. Part of a special series to honor Deaf History Month
item.dc:creator: Pasquinelthe2nd

item.title: Your tax dollars go to these people.
item.description: If you live in the US, UK, Germany, your tax dollars are involved in direct military aid to Israel. If you live in the EU, you still give them funds indirectly through European Neighbourhood Instrument (ENI) and Horizon Europe.

item.title: Wow, Disney! Fuck You! Fuck Marvel! Stan Would Have NEVER Approved This!
item.description: I grew up on comics. What these fucks have done to my childhood... Disney have been grossly injecting Israeli Nazi Ideological bullshit in their movies pretty brazenly (Cpt. America - Brave New World had full on IDF soldier as a super soldier!) and now this! Fuck Disney, AI art, and streaming. Yes, streaming! Some of you forgot why we allowed streaming to become a thing. Want to fight these fucks? Hurt their wallets! Fuck this! YO-HO! HOIST THE COLORS!

item.title: 1963 Chrysler Imperial, which doesn't use light bulbs.
item.description: Back in the early ’60s, Chrysler did something wild with their dashboards: they used electroluminescent (EL) lighting instead of bulbs. Instead of shining light onto the gauges, the gauges themselves glowed. Inside the panel is a thin layer of phosphor sandwiched between conductive layers. When you apply high-voltage AC (around 100–200 volts at high frequency), it excites the phosphor and it emits that signature soft green-blue light. No hotspots, no shadows. Just an even, cool glow. The catch? Cars run on 12V DC, so Chrysler had to add a separate inverter box under the dash to step that up into high-voltage AC. It worked beautifully when new, but the electronics were expensive and not super reliable, so by the late ’60s they quietly went back to traditional bulbs. Still one of the coolest pieces of automotive tech from that era.
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @Justinprking drew da fishies! Love them. Check out more of their work in their posts and leave some love. They've got a ton of interesting work.
27 Man Tax: Zack Ward
“Always listen to experts. They'll tell you what can't be done, and why. Then do it.” - Robert A. Heinlein So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: GovBrief Today #446
item.description: The Southern Poverty Law Center has been exposing the Klan for 55 years. Today, Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, who defended Donald Trump at his 2024 criminal trial, indicted the civil rights organization for paying those informants. Blanche accused SPLC of "manufacturing the extremism it purports to oppose." Paying informants is how SPLC has mapped the American hate group infrastructure since the 1980s. Seven months after an executive order designated anti-fascism as domestic terrorism, the administration has moved from labeling the opposition to indicting it. Donate to the SPLC now so it can fight this. We've emailed 7,000+ stories over 446 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Easy click links, data, images at the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260421-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr21 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-tanker-boarded [3] https://go.govbrief.today/medicaid-audit [4] https://go.govbrief.today/militar-influenza [5] https://go.govbrief.today/splc-indictment [6] https://go.govbrief.today/brennan-subpoenas-withdrawn [7] https://go.govbrief.today/durango-charges-officer [8] https://go.govbrief.today/florida-chatgpt [9] https://go.govbrief.today/fla-camp-open [10] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-afghan-congo [11] https://go.govbrief.today/cherfilus-mccormick-resign [12] https://go.govbrief.today/tx-commandments [13] https://go.govbrief.today/sun-sues-wlf [14] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-tariff-remember [15] https://go.govbrief.today/virginia-redistrict Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com

item.title: Video Memes Vol 3
item.description: As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd Miscellaneous and Videos https://imgur.com/gallery/0k0ca7O NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1675 (isabel buttery)
item.description:
You read the Meme, let's get it.
Don't feed ducks bread.
I don't get attacked by Blackbirds near nesting sites. It's bizarre.
Hell yeah.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hello Pippin. [Conure gibberish] What the hell?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: The B'kdel Test
item.description: Worf and Martok, in Martok’s kitchen on Qo’noS: Worf: Your kitchen is… chaotic. Martok: It is lived in. Unlike the sterile labs you prefer. Worf: I prefer order. Especially when preparing gagh. Martok: Ah. You still overcook it. Worf: It is not overcooked. It is prepared with precision. Martok, chuckling: Precision. Yes. That is what you call fear of texture. Worf: Klingon cuisine requires discipline. Martok stirs a pot, clearly enjoying the mess of it. Martok: Discipline, yes. But also courage. You treat ingredients like enemies to be subdued. Worf: They are not enemies. Martok: Then why do you fight them? Worf: I do not fight them. I ensure they are… properly controlled. Martok: Even soup resists control. Worf pauses, clearly disliking that idea more than he wants to admit. Worf: Then it is a poorly made soup. Martok laughs loudly. There. That is the spirit of a true Klingon chef. Worf: I am not a chef. Martok: No. You are a warrior who fears boiling water.
item.dc:creator: TheMoonBnuuy
